overall.description: A character rows a small wooden boat through extremely foggy waters in a survival horror video game. The thick gray fog obscures all visibility beyond a few meters, creating an oppressive, atmospheric environment with highly realistic water and lighting effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-covered lake surface with zero visibility

agents.ego_description: rowing steadily forward through the dense fog while facing the camera

entered.detail: weathered wooden boat with peeling blue-green paint and metal ribs
wooden seat inside the boat where the character is sitting
wooden oar with yellow stripe being held in left hand
wooden oar with yellow stripe being held in right hand

segments.scene_description: The character rows steadily forward through impenetrable fog, seated in a weathered wooden boat. The camera faces the character directly as they pull the oars through calm water, with gray fog walls visible just beyond the boat's edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-covered lake surface with zero visibility

events.description: character stops rowing and looks to the right side into the fog
character turns to look behind and around the boat, surveying the surroundings

agents.ego_description: pauses rowing to peer nervously into the fog, looking around the boat in different directions

entered.detail: red and black bag visible in the back of the boat when character turns around

segments.scene_description: The character stops rowing and looks around anxiously, shifting to the side of the boat. As they turn to look behind, a red bag becomes visible in the stern, and the camera angle shifts to show different perspectives of the fog-shrouded water.

scene_state.functional_zone: fog-covered lake surface with zero visibility

events.description: character resumes rowing forward after looking around

agents.ego_description: continues rowing through the dense fog, maintaining steady progress while occasionally glancing around

segments.scene_description: The character resumes rowing forward through the endless fog, returning to face the camera. The red bag is no longer visible as the character faces forward again, and the boat continues its slow journey across the still water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement centered on a character in a wooden boat as they navigate a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded expanse. It begins with the character rowing steadily forward through impenetrable gray fog that forms oppressive walls just beyond the boat's edges. As the character stops rowing to look around anxiously, the camera shifts perspective to reveal a red bag resting in the stern amidst the still, shrouded water. The scene then transitions back to a forward-facing view as the character resumes their rowing, leaving the red bag behind. Finally, the boat continues its slow, rhythmic journey, disappearing further into the endless and unchanging mist.
